title: Weekly Vessel Valuations Report, February 15 2022
summary:
Main
Tanker: Tanker values have remained stable. Aframax Taurus Sun (115,600 DWT, May 2007, Sasebo) sold to Westport Tankers for USD 17.20 mil, VV value USD 17.02 mil - SS/DD Due. MR2 Alpine Maya (51,500 DWT, Mar 2010, STX Offshore) sold to Betonix for USD 16.40 mil, VV value USD 16.43 mil - BWTS Fitted.
